ml_ebook.pdf: This document summarizes Aurelien Geron's "Hands-on Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn, Keras, and TensorFlow," providing a comprehensive overview of machine learning from foundational concepts and an end-to-end project workflow to detailed explanations of key supervised and unsupervised algorithms, practical data preparation, model training, evaluation, and regularization techniques.
short-stories-for-children.pdf: This document presents a diverse collection of short narratives, including fables, parables, and anecdotes, each designed to impart moral and practical life lessons, explore human nature, and offer wisdom for personal growth and positive living.
